title: Palamobs [ Discontinued ]
description: An add-on for Palamod Recreated and Custom NPC. The different mobs will finally be able to burst into your adventures with their different dungeon styles, bosses, and NPCs.
body:
# Important Installing !!
**Please install these two mods, they are important and required for using this one.**

- [Palamod Recreated](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladium)
- [Custom NPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/customnpcs-unofficial/version/NeoForge-1.21.1.20241226)

## How to use it
**Palamobs** is not intended for solo use. It contains entities that are not actually functional. Their purpose is to be created from Custom NPCs. They are only models. 

# Palamobs
- Various Boss
- Frigoria
- Manelios
- Nimbria
- Talikus
- Vitalys
- All Pets

### Palamobs is not affiliated with FuzeIII.

We are not affiliated with Paladium, ReCube, or Paladium Games. We are simply a fan mod that recreates the Paladium universe.
